basic_info.description:
👋 I'm Beod Wilson, an intermediate full-stack web and mobile developer with experience developing banking and social media style applications and a love for fun intuitive user interfaces.
I have led developement teams in building software for medium-sized businesses, and a company portal for one of the biggest banks in my country, using modern web and cross-paltform mobile technologies like React, Flutter, Vue, Django and Node JS.
I look forward to creating something amazing with you.

projects.title: Rokel Company Portal
projects.description: Developed a company wide portal containing multiple applications used to capture and process data such as printed statements, total daily transactions per branch and assets purchased by the company.

projects.title: Enterprise Software
projects.description: Developed the front-end of an enterprise software package for small and medium sized businesses using React. Functionalities include sales management, such as receipt and invoice generation, human resource management and more.

projects.title: Food Ordering App
projects.description: A food ordering app project built with Flutter and Firebase. An intuitive and beautiful user interface was visualized using figma  and subsequently implemented.
